title: Royal Caribbean to offer internet service from SpaceX
text: Cruise operator Royal Caribbean is bringing SpaceX's satellite-based internet service to its cruise ships in what it's billing as "the biggest public deployment of Starlink's high-speed internet in the travel industry so far."

title: SpaceX partners with Royal Caribbean to provide high-speed internet
text: Royal Caribbean Group Ltd has signed up for 'space broadband' from Elon Musk's SpaceX, in a bid to become the first cruise company to offer high-speed internet to its passengers. In what will be the biggest public deployment of Starlink's high-speed internet in the travel industry so far, the pair said the technology will be deployed immediately, with full installation expected across the three cruise brands by March 2023, according to a statement.

title: With Profitability On The Horizon, Is Royal Caribbean Stock A Buy?
text: Royal Caribbean stock (NYSE: RCL) has rallied by almost 12% over the past month (about 21 trading days) considerably outperforming the S&P 500 which has remained roughly flat over the same period.

title: Royal Caribbean Cruise Ships to Get SpaceX Starlink Internet
text: High-speed broadband is coming on board Royal Caribbean, Celebrity and Silversea cruises courtesy of Starlink.

title: Royal Caribbean will equip all its cruise ships with Starlink internet
text: After SpaceX announced its Starlink Maritime service last month, it was only a matter of time before some household name in boat world went all-in on the satellite service.

title: Royal Caribbean taps SpaceX's Starlink for internet on its ships
text: The company will be the first in the cruise industry to install Starlink on its ships. Installation across its fleet will be finished by April 2023.

title: Royal Caribbean partners with SpaceX's Starlink for onboard internet
text: Royal Caribbean Cruises will begin offering onboard internet via SpaceX's Starlink satellite network.

title: Royal Caribbean Group to Use SpaceX's Starlink in an Industry-first to Provide High-speed Internet Onboard Full Cruise Fleet
text: MIAMI , Aug. 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) announced today its plan to implement SpaceX's Starlink – making the Group the first in the cruise industry to adopt its high-speed, low-latency connectivity for a better onboard experience for guests and crew fleetwide. The innovative broadband internet service will be installed on all Royal Caribbean International, Celebrity Cruises and Silversea Cruises ships, along with all new vessels for each of the brands.

title: Royal Caribbean Stock: Smooth Sailing Ahead Despite Macroeconomic, Debt Fears
text: Investors need to look beyond RCL's huge debt and the headwinds presented by inflation and possible recession. RCL can now meet its operating and capital costs using cash generated from operations and will, according to analysts revenue estimates, recover beyond pre-pandemic levels by end of 2023.

title: Royal Caribbean Group announces closing of $1.25 billion senior unsecured notes offering to refinance near term debt maturities
text: MIAMI , Aug. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) (the "Company") today announced that it has closed its private offering of $1,250,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 11.625% senior unsecured notes due 2027 (the "Notes"). The Notes will mature on August 15, 2027 unless earlier redeemed or repurchased.

title: Royal Caribbean Group announces upsizing and pricing of $1,250,000,000 senior unsecured notes to refinance near term debt maturities
text: MIAMI , Aug. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) (the "Company") today announced that it has priced its private offering of $1,250,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 11.625% senior unsecured notes due 2027 (the "Notes"). The Notes will mature on August 15, 2027.

title: Royal Caribbean offers $1 billion in 2027 debt to help pay down some debt due this year and next
text: Royal Caribbean Group RCL, +1.56% said Monday it has launched a private offering of $1 billion in senior unsecured notes due 2027. The interest rates for the note has not yet been determined.

title: Royal Caribbean Group announces proposed offering of senior unsecured notes to refinance near term debt maturities
text: MIAMI , Aug. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) (the "Company") today announced that it has commenced a private offering of $1,000,000,000 aggregate principal amount of senior unsecured notes due 2027 (the "Notes"). The Company intends to use the proceeds from the sale of the Notes to repay principal payments on debt maturing in 2022 and/or 2023 (including to pay fees and expenses in connection with such repayments).

title: 3 Cruise Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: When U.S. investors think about cruise stocks to buy on the dip, they usually think of the three main companies: Carnival (NYSE: CCL ), Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE: RCL ), and Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE: NCLH ). However, there are several cruise-related businesses that also make potentially attractive stock picks at this point in the market.

title: Royal Caribbean Group announces closing of $1.15 billion senior convertible notes offering and repurchase of $1.15 billion existing senior convertible notes
text: MIAMI , Aug. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) (the "Company") today announced that it closed its offering of $1.15 billion aggregate principal amount of 6.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2025 (the "Convertible Notes"), including $150 million aggregate principal amount of the Convertible Notes issued pursuant to the exercise in full of the initial purchasers' option to buy additional Convertible Notes. The Convertible Notes will mature on August 15, 2025.

title: Cruise Stock Edges Higher After Convertible Debt Deal
text: The shares of Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd   (NYSE:RCL) are up 1.3% to trade at $36.24 this morning, paring premarket losses after the cruise operator priced an upsized $1 billion convertible debt deal at $50.11, or a 40% premium to the equity's last close.

title: Royal Caribbean Group announces pricing and upsizing of $1 billion senior convertible notes offering to refinance existing convertible notes
text: MIAMI , Aug. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) (the "Company") today announced that it has priced the offering of $1 billion aggregate principal amount of 6.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2025 (the "Convertible Notes"). In connection with the offering of the Convertible Notes, the Company granted certain of the initial purchasers of the Convertible Notes a 13-day option to purchase up to an additional $150 million aggregate principal amount of the Convertible Notes.

title: Royal Caribbean Starts $900 Million Bond Offering. The Stock Drops.

title: RCL Stock Alert: Why Is Royal Caribbean Sinking Today?
text: Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE: RCL ) is falling this morning on news that the company is conducting a private debt offering. The world's second-largest cruise line operator has issued $900 million in senior convertible bonds, set to mature in 2025.

title: Royal Caribbean to offer $900 million in convertible bonds due 2025
text: Royal Caribbean Group RCL, +2.25% said Monday it has commenced a private offering of $900 million of senior convertible bonds that mature in 2025. The company said it would grant the initial purchasers an option to purchase up to $135 million more in convertible bonds.

title: Royal Caribbean Group announces proposed offering of senior convertible notes to refinance existing outstanding senior convertible notes
text: MIAMI, Aug. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ — Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) (the “Company”) today announced that it has commenced a private offering of senior convertible notes to be issued by the Company due 2025 (the “Convertible Notes”) in an aggregate principal amount of up to $900 million. In addition, the Company intends to grant the […]...

title: Royal Caribbean Group announces proposed offering of senior convertible notes to refinance existing outstanding senior convertible notes
text: MIAMI , Aug. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) (the "Company") today announced that it has commenced a private offering of senior convertible notes to be issued by the Company due 2025 (the "Convertible Notes") in an aggregate principal amount of up to $900 million. In addition, the Company intends to grant the initial purchasers an option to purchase up to an additional $135 million principal amount of Convertible Notes.
